name: yt-hist-search-desktop
description: Electron shell for local yt-hist-search backend and frontend

scripts.dev: export FRONTEND_PORT=$(node scripts/setup-dev-environment.js frontend) && export BACKEND_PORT=$(node scripts/setup-dev-environment.js backend) && concurrently -k "pnpm --dir frontend dev" "wait-on tcp:$FRONTEND_PORT && electron electron/main.cjs"
